ALAN THE MEXICAN

ESCAPE FROM VALENCIA

It started as a quiet Sunday in Valencia. Alan was just trying to enjoy a horchata at the Mercado Central when he caught the eye of la Rubia and her crew — a gang of ferociously hungry women who've decided Alan is on the menu. Now they're chasing him through the sunlit streets of Valencia, and they will NOT take no for an answer.

Run, Alan. RUN.
